every second is a signal.

Report emergencies with your exact location, watch affected zones update on a live map, and call in rescue teams or volunteers in a single tap.

Core tools

Everything a response team and a bystander both need

Six connected tools, one shared map — built for the moments that can't wait for paperwork.

📍

Live emergency reporting

File a report in under a minute with your exact GPS location attached automatically.

Report now →
🗺️

Interactive live map

See every reported incident plotted in real time, color-coded by type and severity.

Open map →
🆘

One-tap rescue request

Trapped or in danger? Send your live coordinates straight to rescue teams instantly.

Request rescue →
🤝

Volunteer registration

Sign up your skills and availability so coordinators can call on you when it matters.

Become a volunteer →
☎️

Emergency contacts

Police, fire, ambulance and disaster-management hotlines, one tap away from calling.

View contacts →
🤖

AI first aid assistant

Ask quick questions on CPR, bleeding, burns, or evacuation while help is on the way.

Ask the assistant →
How it works

From the first tap to boots on the ground

STEP 01

Report or request rescue

Describe what's happening — your location is captured automatically, no typing an address under pressure.

STEP 02

It lands on the live map

The incident appears instantly for coordinators and nearby volunteers, colour-coded by urgency.

STEP 03

Response gets dispatched

Admins triage the case and assign volunteers or emergency services, tracking status to resolution.

SDRRS

A community-driven platform for real-time disaster reporting, rescue coordination and volunteer response.

Platform

  • Live map
  • Volunteer
